title: Cobblemon Interface [Pipez]
description: Pipez GUI in Cobblemon Interface style.
body:
This resource pack changes the default interface of the [Pipez](https://modrinth.com/mod/pipez) mod, giving it style and atmosphere [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface).

🎨 All original ideas and visual style of Cobblemon Interface belong to [VinnyStalck](https://modrinth.com/user/VinnyStalck).

🔧 Mod Pipez created by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax), [Bommel24](https://modrinth.com/user/Bommel24).

### Important

Support for this resource pack will cease if [Cobblemon Interface Modded](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface-modded) starts supporting the Pipez mod.
